name: Fore Factory Dubois
about: Fore Factory Golf operates a 24/7 self-serve facility featuring two GSPro simulators for golf and one Full Swing Multi-Sport simulator that also offers 15+ other activities. The venue provides an all-weather environment with a relaxed, comfortable atmosphere for individual practice, parties, or group outings. It is an unstaffed space where customers set their own vibe, with bar areas in some simulators and an emphasis on a casual, high-tech experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Open 24/7, 365 days a year, unaffected by weather
High-end GSPro simulators for realistic golf simulation
Full Swing Multi-Sport simulator offers variety beyond golf
Relaxed, self-serve atmosphere with no staff pressure

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service, BYOB likely allowed
No mention of alcohol service, BYOB likely allowed

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can either bring your own clubs or rent them from the facility for a fee per session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is unstaffed and allows you to bring your own food and drinks to set your own vibe.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the simulator and your group's pace, but typically ranges from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers activities suitable for all ages, including a multi-sport simulator with various games.
